figures.caption: Table 1: Defect detection accuracy (image-level AUROC, %) of different methods on MVTec-AD. Bold indicates the best result per column. Underlined values indicate improvements over UniAD.
Table 2: Defect localization accuracy (pixel-level AUROC, %) of different methods on MVTec-AD. Bold indicates the best result per column.
Table 4: Defect localization accuracy (pixel-level AUROC, %) of different methods on VisA. Bold indicates the best result.
Table 3: Defect detection accuracy (image-level AUROC, %) of different methods on VisA. Bold indicates the best result.
